label: Full-Stack SaaS Architecture
text: Architected full-stack B2B SaaS platform spanning React, Redux, TypeScript, Three.js, Flask, and AWS infrastructure - EC2, S3, Lambda, CloudFront, RDS Aurora, Redis, with automated pipelines. End-to-end ownership of the full stack.

label: High-Throughput Data & APIs
text: Designed scalable, RESTful APIs using Python and Flask for large-scale HVAC data streamed through RabbitMQ to a PostgreSQL database for fault detection and diagnosis that delivered 25% cost savings. Migrated data to S3 using AWS Glue to save 57% on cost, queried via Athena-backed APIs for analytics.

label: LLM-Powered Support Chatbot
text: Collaborated with AI Engineers to build an agent-based LLM+RAG chatbot using LangChain and LlamaIndex, achieving 85% response accuracy validated through internal subject matter testing.

label: Generative-AI Data Labeling
text: Deployed a generative-AI labeling workflow using OpenAI API to label unstructured IoT data for analysis, increasing speed by 67% and automating a manual process while maintaining 90% labeling accuracy.

label: Product & Stakeholder Alignment
text: Partnered with Product, UX, and Customer Success to translate evolving B2B requirements into weekly releases.

label: Enterprise Application Development
text: Built Angular components for prepaid.t-mobile.com serving 20M+ users, implementing responsive design and cross-browser compatibility.

label: Microservices & Payment Systems
text: Developed Java and Spring Boot microservices processing 5K+ daily transactions with enterprise-grade security and OAuth 2.0 protocols.

label: API Integration
text: Designed REST and SOAP APIs to connect legacy billing systems with modern applications following enterprise architecture standards and PCI compliant guidelines.

label: Technical Documentation & Training
text: Authored significant technical documentation and conducted 20+ knowledge transfer sessions, reducing onboarding time by 30%.

label: Incident Response Leadership
text: Led 40+ critical system responses, implementing Splunk monitoring dashboards that improved resolution times and communicated issues with stakeholders.

label: Test Automation
text: Developed Java and Selenium automated test cases for event management workflows, reducing manual testing effort and boosting the test suite coverage.

label: Business Impact Development
text: Contributed to Lead Scoring algorithm using Java/SQL, reducing hoteliers' response time on event inquiries by over 90%.
